---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Wigent
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe it clearly and concisely.

> Example: "I'm frustrated when the agent cannot [...]"

---

## Proposed Solution

What do you want to happen? Describe the desired behavior, API, or workflow.

---

## Alternative Approaches

What alternatives have you considered? Why aren't they sufficient?

---

## Impact

| Aspect | Description |
|---|---|
| Who benefits | End users / developers / both |
| Effort estimate | Small / Medium / Large |
| Breaking changes | Yes / No |
| Dependencies | List any new libraries or services required |

---

## Implementation Hints

If you have ideas on how to implement this, share them here:
- Files that would need changes
- New tools or modules needed
- Integration points with existing code

---

## Checklist

- [ ] I have checked existing issues and PRs for this feature
- [ ] This feature aligns with the project's scope
- [ ] I am willing to contribute this feature (optional)
